summary: Clear audience recording with a slight pitch issue; Stella Blue shines as the highlight.
review: Both reviewers praise the audio for its clarity and well‑rounded sound, noting only a minor quarter‑tone sharpness on the song "Cassidy." The performance of "Stella Blue" is singled out as especially good, making this a worthwhile listen despite the unknown set details.

ai_rating.rationale: Two 4‑star reviews highlight solid sound quality and a standout song; limited data on the musical performance keeps confidence low.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very clear and well‑rounded audio; slight pitch sharpness (~¼ tone) on "Cassidy" noted by one reviewer.
